comments.body: Thanks for the report. I'll need to verify your machine is enrolled in the new MDM. Can you check System Settings → Privacy & Security → Profiles and tell me what's listed?
I see two profiles: Acme MDM v2 and Cisco AnyConnect.
Internal note: third VPN-on-new-Mac case this week. Pinging the network team about the MDM cert renewal.

Found it — the MDM profile is missing the new device certificate. I'm pushing it now; should be on your machine in about 5 minutes. Try the VPN again after.

Reply here once it works (or if it still fails) and I'll close this out.
